response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications including C programming for UNIX embedded systems, Linux kernel modification experience, native-level Japanese proficiency, and any demonstrated background in embedded networking, security protocols (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X), or switch firmware development — all essential for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated ability to build and maintain complex systems (e.g., GISCollective, CI/CD infrastructure)
Active contributor to open-source tools and technical education (workshops, libraries)
concerns: No evidence of C programming in embedded or UNIX kernel contexts
No Japanese language proficiency — a mandatory requirement
No experience with LAN-switch products, embedded security features, or networking protocols like NETCONF/SNMP

key_factors.factor: Lack of Network Security Domain Knowledge
